title: C1Gamer’s SRP Crafting Tweaks
description: Scape and Run: Parasites addon that brings crafting recipes to items that desperately need them!
body:
Adds recipes to uncraftable items from the mod Scape and Run: Parasites. Includes recipes for maw, living armor, fortified bone, node compass, and even host spawn egg for some reason.

JEI is essentially required.

Features recipe compatibility with [NoCube's Nests Addon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scape-and-run-parasites-nests-addon-by-nocube).

**Made in MCreator, like all the best SRP addons.**
